message:
fix: remove go-sqlite3 dependency, use Dolt testcontainers for tests

Replace the SQLite in-memory test harness in store_unit_test.go with
the Dolt testcontainer infrastructure already used by other tests.
Rewrite doctor_health.go to connect to the Dolt server via MySQL
instead of opening a (broken) SQLite file path. This removes the
last consumer of github.com/ncruces/go-sqlite3.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
